name: senacodex-app
description: Sistema de Gerenciamento de Projetos Integradores

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:db && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install -w frontend && npm install -w backend
